_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: overexpression of ΔN90 β-catenin significantly increased the number of Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre, but not Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre, neurofibroma spheres... 7/9 mice injected with ΔN90 β-catenin infected Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre spheres developed neurofibroma like lesions
details: Overexpression of ΔN90 β-catenin significantly increased sphere numbers in Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre cells and enabled tumor formation in 7/9 transplanted mice
